text:
EXAMPLE 2: 

The condition of a patient, who has irritable bowel syndrome or is recovering from rectal 
surgery, may be such that he or she can be given an enema safely and effectively only by 
a nurse. If the enema were necessary to treat the illness or injury, then the visit would be 
covered as a skilled nursing visit. The documentation must support the skilled need for 
the enema, and the plan for future visits based on this information.
